Introduction
    My Dear Warrior is a TV series starring Tanapak Jongjaiphar, Pimchanok Leuwisetpaiboon, and Varot Makaduangkeo. She dreams of the guy from her favorite story. Then she literally meets him -- and his supporting cast. What drama.
